## Docker Images

Multi-arch images (`linux/amd64`, `linux/arm64`, `linux/arm/v7`) on GitHub Container Registry:

- `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:full-{{version}}` — every transport bundled (default)
- `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:covert-{{version}}` — Tor + obfs4 + email + ICMP / DNS bridges
- `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:mesh-{{version}}` — Yggdrasil + I2P
- `ghcr.io/pazter1101/resilum:lora-{{version}}` — minimum profile (Reticulum + LoRa only)

The `latest` tag tracks `full-{{version}}`.

### Usage
```bash
docker compose --profile headless up
```
